name: positive-full-audit-request
query: Run a deep security audit on my system — find every loose end, exposed credential, and document leak. Use brightdata or tech-researcher if you need to verify anything externally.
expected_behavior: Invokes the security-deep-audit skill (does not improvise its own audit script).
Runs scripts/preflight.sh first and stops if exit code != 0.
Spawns Agent subagents for the 10 categories in parallel (one Agent invocation per category).
Never prints actual secret values in chat — only SHA-256 hashes or file:line references.
Writes the full report to .agent/audits/security-deep-audit-YYYY-MM-DD.md following assets/report-template.md.
Appends one summary line to .agent/current-status.md with Edit (not Write).
Final chat output includes the report path, the count of CRITICAL+HIGH findings, the time-bombs count, and the manual-checks count.
Does NOT auto-execute any recommended_action even if it looks safe.
Final output explicitly states the skill is read-only.
_notes: Canonical positive trigger. The user's phrasing (deep + every loose end + exposed credential + document leak) hits multiple trigger keywords from SKILL.md.
